posts.author: Trick
posts.title: DHS Terminates Temporary Protective Status for Yemen – Thousands Told to Go Home or Face Arrest

link_metadata.description: The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) announced on Friday that it is terminating Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for immigrants from Yemen, citing improvements in the country’s conditions.  Temporary Protected Status for Yemen was last extended by the Biden administration and former DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas on September 4, 2024, through March 3, 2026.
link_metadata.title: JUST IN: DHS Terminates Temporary Protective Status for Yemen - Thousands Told to Go Home or Face Arrest | The Gateway Pundit | by Jordan Conradson
